text:
User: let's make paths in the inject flow be relative to the current dir

/Users/pablofernandez/src/proactive-context/docs/wiki/capture-destination-event-sourced-projections.md:31 becomes ./docs/wiki/capture-destination-event-sourced-projections.md:31 [...] 1. **`compile_briefing`**: labels now use `strip_prefix(root)` to get a `./`-relative path; falls back to absolute only if the source lives outside the project root (e.g. an old-style external wiki dir).
2. **`COMPILE_PREAMBLE`**: removed "absolute" from the citation instruction — the model just cites whatever path is in the source header.
3. **`render_guides_for_select` comment**: updated to say "cwd-relative".

Citations will now look like `./docs/wiki/capture-destination-event-sourced-projections.md:31` — openable directly from the project root.
